description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake that runs on every push to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: Build and Coverage. The Build job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for different C++ compilers and build types, and it should install dependencies, configure CMake, build, and test. The Coverage job should also run on ubuntu-latest, install dependencies, configure CMake for coverage, build, test, and generate a coverage report, then upload it to Codecov using a CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
